sections.paragraph:
Original: שׂדרה

Transliteration: śedêrâh

Phonetic: sed-ay-raw'

BDB Definition:

  1. row, rank (of soldiers)
    1. rows, ranks
    2. technical term of building
      1. meaning unknown

Origin: from an unused root meaning to regulate

TWOT entry: 1467b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
